queue.title: The Scalability Wall: When HNSW Breaks
queue.hook: Local HNSW hit a wall at 100+ agents.

queue.title: Idempotent Pruning: The MemoryBridgeV2 Win
queue.hook: Pruning 10k expired memories shouldn’t crash your substrate.

queue.title: The Local Karen Audit: Automating No-Fluff
queue.hook: We automated the “No Fluff” mandate with a local 8-step adversarial filter.

queue.title: 5-Agent Pipeline Live
queue.hook: The moment the AI team finishes deploying itself and then offers to QA its own work unprompted. 5 agents, one swarm, live on my machine.

queue.title: The Shared Substrate: Solving Multi-Agent Amnesia
queue.hook: I used to build agents that forgot everything the moment the task ended. Now, they share a brain. Here is the architecture I’m using to keep a live swarm in sync.

queue.title: The Self-Optimizing Agent: End of Prompt Engineering
queue.hook: I stopped 'prompt engineering' and started building agents that fix themselves. This is how the system actually learns from its own mistakes.

queue.title: Production RAG vs. Toys
queue.hook: Forget demo-tier RAG. If you're not using distributed vector storage for your enterprise data, you're just playing with toys.

queue.title: Hermes v2.0: The Distributed Reveal
queue.hook: Scale is the only thing that matters. We're moving Hermes from local HNSW to distributed vector storage. v2.0 is here.

queue.title: Content is Code: The SDLC Shift
queue.hook: I stopped 'chatting' with AI and started writing specs for a swarm of content auditors. Here is why the SDLC is the secret to high-signal brand building.

queue.title: Intent to Artifact: The Pipeline
queue.hook: Why I stopped 'prompt engineering' and started architecting intent. The 5-agent pipeline that turns a raw brain dump into verified content assets.

queue.title: The Goosebumps Moment
queue.hook: That moment when the agent surprises the builder. It moved from 'I told it' to 'It understood'. Watching intention become artifact is wild.
